emails.subject: Trans Pecos Meeting
emails.body: Trans Pecos Meeting Please plan to attend a meeting on Monday, January, 7 from 3:30pm to 4:00pm in EB49C1 to discuss the Trans Pecos Project. Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: FW: Trans Pecos Meeting
emails.body: FW: Trans Pecos Meeting Kim, I'm traveling on Monday but may be able to call in - is there a contact number? Also, I'll ask Kevin Hyatt to attend on my behalf.

emails.subject: RE: Trans Pecos Meeting
emails.body: RE: Trans Pecos Meeting I will check. We are in 49C1 which is a very large conference room and I'm thinking the phone is off to the side by some side chairs and may not have a long enough cord to stretch to the table. I will inspect and keep you posted. Thanks, Kim
